assertions.title: Lightweight runtime/env output stops seeding `paperclip` defaults

steps.expected: Lightweight runtime/env output uses renamed defaults only and does not print `paperclip`, `paperclip-api`, or `Paperclip`.
steps.observed: Command succeeded and showed renamed defaults such as `papierklammer-api` and `papierklammer`; scan found no `paperclip`, `paperclip-api`, or `Paperclip` matches.

steps.expected: Doctor help is operator-visible `papierklammer`/`Papierklammer` copy only.
steps.observed: Command succeeded with `Usage: papierklammer doctor|--fix [options]` and `Run diagnostic checks on your Papierklammer setup`; scan found no legacy branding tokens.

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Scanned the captured outputs for `paperclip`, `paperclip-api`, and `Paperclip`; no matches remained.

assertions.title: Generated runtime text and asset surfaces are renamed

steps.expected: Representative generated runtime index text returns 200 and uses renamed `Papierklammer` wording only.
steps.observed: Route returned `HTTP/1.1 200 OK`; body heading was `# Papierklammer Agent Configuration Index` and the captured output had no `paperclip`, `paperclip-api`, or `Paperclip` matches.

steps.expected: Representative adapter configuration text returns 200 and uses renamed wording only.
steps.observed: Route returned `HTTP/1.1 200 OK`; body described Gemini usage in `Papierklammer` terms only and the captured output had no legacy token matches.

steps.expected: Representative adapter configuration text returns 200 and contains no legacy `paperclip`/`Paperclip` wording.
steps.observed: Route returned `HTTP/1.1 200 OK` but still leaked legacy tokens: `paperclipApiUrl`, `paperclip`, `paperclip.workspace`, `paperclip.workspaces`, and `paperclip.workspaceRuntime`.

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: The openclaw gateway response still contains 5 lowercase `paperclip` matches.

assertions.issues: VAL-RUNTIME-006 failed because `/llms/agent-configuration/openclaw_gateway.txt` still exposes legacy `paperclip` field names and defaults even though the shared index and `gemini_local` route are clean.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: VAL-RUNTIME-005 passed, and VAL-RUNTIME-006 failed because `/llms/agent-configuration/openclaw_gateway.txt` still leaks legacy `paperclip` field names/defaults.
